Entry Pages
and
Exit Pages
reports by full URL, instead of just path. This is especially helpful in seeing exactly where traffic is going across your subdomains like website, app, docs and more.
To enable it, open the
⋮
menu in the top-right corner of the report and select
URL
. We’ll remember your choice for future visits.
Learn more about tracking subdomains
.
Jun 10, 2026
New AI Assistants channel
You will now see a dedicated
AI Assistants
channel in your “Channels” report. Clicking it would reveal your individual AI traffic sources like ChatGPT, Claude, Google Gemini, Perplexity, etc.
Your historical traffic data has also been reclassified under the new channel.
May 27, 2026
User journeys is here!
You can now see the actual paths visitors take through your site with the new User Journeys feature.
Analyze journeys from both a starting point and end point perspective to understand how visitors move between pages and events, discover the most common paths leading to conversions, uncover drop-off points and see conversion rates for each journey.
To get started, open the
Explore
tab from the report navigation bar alongside Goals, Properties and Funnels.
L﻿earn more here
.
Apr 14, 2026
Strict order funnels for precise path analysis
You can now make your funnels strict.
When enabled, every step must happen in exact consecutive order with no other actions in between.
This is useful when you want to measure a tightly defined path and ensure any detour disqualifies the conversion.
Learn more in
our funnel analysis docs
.
Mar 18, 2026
Sort your sites by traffic
I﻿f you have multiple sites on Plausible, you can now sort them by:
Most/least visitors in the last 24 hours
Domain name (A–Z or Z–A)
Pinned sites would still stay on top. Visit your
All Sites
page to try.
Feb 11, 2026
Last 24 Hours
A new time range for “Last 24 Hours” is now available on your dashboard. Open the time range picker to select it or press
H
on your keyboard to switch instantly and see how your site has performed over the past 24 hours.
Feb 4, 2026
Goals with custom properties
You can now select up to three existing custom properties and values directly in the goal settings. This lets you turn a broad goal into a more specific one, like a Purchase goal for specific subscription plans and payment cycles.
T﻿his works with all types of goals: pageview goals, custom events and scroll goals.
Goals with properties behave like built-in
segments
for your dashboard. These would also help make
funnels
more precise, since each step can now represent a specific version of a goal instead of a
catch all
.
P.S. Sending custom properties works exactly as before. You still send them in your goal snippet and can use them for filtering and breakdowns across the dashboard.
L﻿earn more about
goals
and
custom properties
.
Jan 5, 2026
Limited dashboard sharing
H﻿appy new year! Here are a few updates to kick off the new year. 🎈
Limited dashboard sharing
When
sharing your dashboard
with external parties, you can now choose to show only specific, filtered data, i.e.,
share only a segment of you stats
.
Anyone opening such a shared link will only see that segment and won’t be able to remove it. They would be able to add more filters to drill down further, but they won’t be able to see any data outside the selected segment.
This makes it easy to share only the data you want with the right audience.
O﻿ther updates
You can now see what percentage of your visitors came from different traffic sources, locations, and devices, as well as what percentage visited each page. A percentage column appears when you hover over a report and when the report is expanded.
Enterprise customers now have the option to access their privacy-friendly event level data with
scheduled raw event data exports
.
Nov 24, 2025
Revenue breakdown in your reports
I﻿f you track your
revenue goals
in Plausible, you can now see a breakdown of your revenue within the individual reports as well.
Whenever the revenue goal is applied on your dashboard and you expand any report (by clicking on “Details”), you will find a new “Revenue” column appear. This helps you see exactly which traffic sources, top/entry/exit pages, locations, browser/OS/device types, and custom properties contributed to how much revenue and make judgements on what drives value best.
Nov 17, 2025
Introducing, Consolidated Views
If you have multiple websites/dashboards in your Plausible account, you will find a brand new consolidated view on your
All Sites
page.
T﻿his gives you an overview of traffic across all your websites, allows you to quickly see the total number of visitors and other key metrics across all your properties in one place and works like any other dashboard that you can access and change the settings of. Find full info
here
.
Nov 5, 2025
Team owners can now enforce 2FA for extra security, and our security practices
W﻿e’ve made security in Plausible even stronger.
New
: Team owners can now make
two-factor authentication (2FA)
mandatory
for all members. This helps teams keep their accounts and data even more secure. You can manage your team’s 2FA settings in the Team Settings section. Everything you need to know is
here
.
Overview
: W﻿e take security very seriously, here’s a reminder of everything you can do to keep your account secure:
Manage active sessions:
View and
remotely log out
of any device from your account settings. All sessions automatically expire after 14 days of inactivity.
Password protection:
If you change your password, Plausible
automatically signs you out
of all other devices to keep your account safe.
Single Sign-On (SSO):
Teams on eligible plans can
enable SSO
to make logging in simpler and more secure.
Beyond account-level security, we follow strict best practices: we don’t use cookies, don’t collect personal data, and encrypt all data in transit and at rest. We’re also fully GDPR, CCPA, and PECR compliant. Learn more about how we keep your data safe
here
.
P.S. We’ve also made the dark theme even darker. If you prefer dark mode,
give it a try
!
Oct 8, 2025
Plug-and-play setup for optional measurements, automatic form analytics, and more
W﻿e have so many updates to share with you!
1. Brand new Plausible script for easier setup and more flexibility
The new Plausible script makes managing your analytics easier than ever. You can now enable or disable optional measurements (like outbound link clicks, file downloads, and form submissions) or even change your site’s domain —
all without changing your site snippet again
.
If you’re using the previous script, you’ll need to update to this new version once to take advantage of these improvements.
2. Introducing, automatic form submission tracking
Form submissions tracking
is now available as an optional measurement to track. Just toggle on to start tracking.
Plausible automatically detects and records all form submissions across your site, making it easy to measure signups, contact form conversions, etc.
3﻿. Official Google Tag Manager template
I﻿f you prefer installing/managing Plausible using Google Tag Manager, it’s now way easier to do that.
We’ve launched our
official GTM template
, allowing you to set up Plausible through Google Tag Manager with a simple, code-free configuration. Best of both worlds!
Jul 29, 2025
SSO is now available!
N﻿ow you can enable SSO for your team on Plausible. SSO gives you a way to access Plausible without having to create a separate account for Plausible and managing additional credentials.
This is possible by first logging in to identity provider (IdP) - be it Google, Okta, Microsoft (Entra) or other - and accessing Plausible through it.
Our SSO implementation is SAML 2.0 compliant and it should be compatible with almost every identity provider as SAML 2.0 protocol is widely supported.
L﻿earn more about the implementation on our
docs
,
contact us
for enabling this feature.
Jul 8, 2025
Introducing, Managed Proxy
I﻿f you want your Plausible script to bypass some ad blockers for more accurate stats, you can
proxy
the Plausible script and endpoint through your own domain name, making it a first-party connection.
W﻿hat’s new
: If you’d rather not deal with managing your own proxy, we can now handle it for you. Just set up a CNAME record using the instructions we’ll send you, update the snippet on your site, and we’ll take care of the rest.
Managed proxy is available on our Enterprise plans,
contact us
for details.
Apr 8, 2025
Improved "Time on Page" metric
We’ve made some big upgrades to how the “Time on Page” metric works:
M﻿ore accurate tracking:
Prior to 1 March 2025, the Time on Page was calculated as the difference between the point a visitor landed on a page and when they moved on to the next page. The new tracking method relies on engagement signals. This allows us to provide you with a more precise and reliable measure of user engagement which includes visitors who bounce away from your pages and which does not include time not spent actively on your pages.
View it on the top graph:
You can now click on the Time on Page metric to see how it trends over time (available for date ranges starting 1 March 2025).
Sort by it:
In the Top Pages Details view, you can now sort pages by Time on Page to quickly see where visitors spend the most (or least) time.
W﻿hen viewing data for periods before 1 March 2025, the legacy Time on Page metric is displayed along with a note in the tooltip.
Apr 1, 2025
Create a team in Plausible
It’s now much easier to manage teams on Plausible. You can now:
Add multiple owners and billing contacts, so you’re not stuck if someone’s away or has left the company.
Invite multiple people to a site at once.
Add someone to several sites in one go.
No more one-by-one invites.
You’ll find the new
“Create a Team”
option in the upper-right menu. You can also view and switch between your teams there — and still access your personal sites under
“My Personal Sites”
.
Team roles include: Viewer, Editor, Admin, Billing, and Owner.
Mar 10, 2025
Scroll Depth tracking
The scroll depth metric is now available in your Plausible Analytics dashboard. You can find it in the Top Pages report or in your dashboard’s top row when filtering by a page or pages.
W﻿e are tracking this metric automatically for all pages on your site—no setup required. We track scroll depth at all page heights––(1% to 100%).
Introducing, Scroll Depth goals
You can now set up Scroll Depth Goals to track how many visitors reach and exceed a specific scroll depth percentage on your selected pages. Learn more
here
.
Mar 6, 2025
Save and reuse segments
You can now save segments for quick and easy access! When you create a segment using one or more filters, you will find a new option to save it along with a display name (e.g.,
Organic signups
) and access it later from your “Filter” menu.
There are two types of segments you can create:
Personal Segments
– Save segments for your own use.
Site Segments
(business plan) – Share saved segments with your team members.
L﻿earn all details about using saved segments
here
.
Feb 5, 2025
Automatically track form completions with the WordPress plugin
We just released version 2.2.0 of the Plausible WordPress plugin. The highlight of this update is you can now track contact form submissions automatically, without any manual tagging or extra setup.
We have verified and tested this tracking with Contact Form 7, WP Forms, Ninja Forms and Elementor Forms but it should work for most other forms plugins as well.
To enable form tracking:
Go to the
“Enhanced measurements”
section in the Plausible WordPress plugin settings.
Toggle on
“Form completions”
tracking.
Once enabled, all successful form completions will be tracked and displayed in the
“Goal Conversions”
report in your Plausible Analytics dashboard.
You’ll see a
“WP Form Completions”
goal appear once the first successful submission is recorded. If you have multiple forms on your site, you can click on this goal to see a breakdown by page.
T﻿o learn more about the Plausible Wo

analysis.name: Plausible Analytics
analysis.tagline: Easy to use and privacy-friendly Google Analytics alternative
analysis.value_proposition: Simple, lightweight, privacy-friendly web analytics with no cookies, hosted in the EU, as an open-source alternative to Google Analytics.
analysis.ideal_customer: Privacy-conscious website owners, SaaS companies, ecommerce sites, agencies, publishers and creators who find Google Analytics overkill and want simple, GDPR-friendly analytics without cookie banners

recent_ships.what: Full URLs in Page reports (Top Pages, Entry Pages, Exit Pages)
recent_ships.source: You can now break down the Top Pages, Entry Pages and Exit Pages reports by full URL

recent_ships.what: New AI Assistants channel in Channels report
recent_ships.source: dedicated AI Assistants channel in your Channels report
see the actual paths visitors take through your site with the new User Journeys feature

recent_ships.what: Strict order funnels for precise path analysis
recent_ships.source: every step must happen in exact consecutive order with no other actions in between
you can now sort them by: Most/least visitors in the last 24 hours, Domain name
A new time range for Last 24 Hours is now available on your dashboard
You can now select up to three existing custom properties and values directly in the goal settings
you can now choose to show only specific, filtered data
you can now see what percentage of your visitors came from different traffic sources
Enterprise customers now have the option to access their privacy-friendly event level data with scheduled raw event data exports
you can now see a breakdown of your revenue within the individual reports as well

praised: We're massive users of Plausible here at Hugging Face - Clem Delangue
Been a very happy customer of Plausible at Basecamp - DHH
fantastic product. We switched over everything from GA - John O'Nolan (Ghost)
SOOOO easy to use (for clients too) and the data is near real-time
impressed by a SaaS UX + design
All the conversion tracking we need, it has every report we use
GDPR Compliance w/o Cookie Consent Banner
Tiny (< 1KB) Tracking Script
complaints: Plausible Analytics Isn't GDPR Compliant (contested claim on HN)
Not free and not a ton of bells and whistles

free_tier.limits: 30-day free trial; free self-hosted option available

tiers.name: Growth
tiers.headline_inclusions: Entry-level plan; usage-based by monthly pageviews (specific pricing not visible in provided sources)

tiers.name: Business
tiers.headline_inclusions: Higher-tier plan with advanced features (specific pricing not visible in provided sources)

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.headline_inclusions: SSO, scheduled raw event data exports, white-label, custom terms

pricing.notes: Pricing details not fully visible in provided sources — Plausible uses usage-based pricing tiers based on monthly pageviews. 30-day free trial. Nonprofit and education discounts available. Self-hosting is free (open source).

We and our third-party partners use cookies.
Before you have given your consent, only required cookies will be deployed. Click "Settings" to select whether and to what extent you consent to the use of cookies on our website. To learn more about the cookies we use, visit our Cookie Policy.
By clicking on the “Accept” button you consent to the use of all our cookies. By closing this box you refuse the use of all our cookies.
Cookie Policy
Cookies Settings
Continue Without Cookies
Accept All Cookies
Opt-Out Request Honored
Privacy Preference Center
When you visit any website, it may store or retrieve information on your browser, mostly in the form of cookies. This information might be about you, your preferences or your device and is mostly used to make the site work as you expect it to. The information does not usually directly identify you, but it can give you a more personalized web experience. Because we respect your right to privacy, you can choose not to allow some types of cookies. Click on the different category headings to find out more and change our default settings. However, blocking some types of cookies may impact your experience of the site and the services we are able to offer.
More information
Allow All
Manage Consent Preferences
Functional Cookies
Functional Cookies
These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalisation. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages.    If you do not allow these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.
Cookies Details‎
Targeting Cookies
Targeting Cookies
These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites.    They do not store directly personal information, but are based on uniquely identifying your browser and internet device. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising.
Cookies Details‎
Performance Cookies
Performance Cookies
These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site.    All information these cookies collect is aggregated and therefore anonymous. If you do not allow these cookies we will not know when you have visited our site, and will not be able to monitor its performance.
Cookies Details‎
Strictly Necessary Cookies
Always Active
These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms.    You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the site will not then work. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable information.

Targeting Cookies
Targeting Cookies
These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites.    They do not store directly personal information, but are based on uniquely identifying your browser and internet device. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising.
Cookies Details‎
Performance Cookies
Performance Cookies
These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site.    All information these cookies collect is aggregated and therefore anonymous. If you do not allow these cookies we will not know when you have visited our site, and will not be able to monitor its performance.

Always Active
These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms.    You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the site will not then work. free_tier.limits: Up to 10k monthly sessions; 6 months data history

tiers.name: Free
tiers.headline_inclusions: Core charts, unlimited enrichment sources, Guides integrations, 6mo history, SSO, 10k monthly sessions

tiers.name: Growth
tiers.headline_inclusions: All Free + Sense AI, unlimited users/reports, chart customization, CSV exports, 12mo history, email support

tiers.name: Pro
tiers.headline_inclusions: All Growth + account analytics, engagement matrix, report alerts, session replay add-on, standard support

tiers.name: Premier
tiers.headline_inclusions: All Pro + warehouse integration, behavioral targeting, unlimited projects, advanced permissions, dedicated CSM, regional storage

pricing.notes: Custom session-based pricing for Pro and Premier tiers — no public per-seat or flat prices disclosed. Free tier capped at 10k monthly sessions. Session Replay and Heatmaps are paid add-ons even on Pro/Premier.

Our pricing philosophy
Interested in customizing your plan?
Talk to Sales today
All-in access
When you buy a Pendo module, you get full functionality – no gated features, no forced upgrades. While other vendors fence capabilities by plan, you get complete access from day one to scale without limits.
Savings as you scale
As you upgrade plans or add usage, the incremental cost of adding more Pendo decreases. We build volume-based savings into our pricing, so you can plan growth with confidence.
Predictable by design
No bait and switch. We don’t hook you with a low starting price and surprise you later. Your pricing is clear upfront, and changes only when your usage or plan changes.
Find the right Pendo for you

Pendo Pricing FAQ
+
−
How does Pendo pricing work?
Pendo pricing combines two things: the number of Monthly Active Users (MAUs) you track and the functionality you choose as part of your plan. As you add more MAUs, your overall price increases, but the cost per MAU goes down.
This model makes it simple to start small and expand as your needs grow. You only pay for the scale and functionality that create value for your business, and you can add more at any time. Our focus is helping you grow adoption and realize greater value from Pendo, so our priorities remain directly tied to the outcomes that matter most to you.
+
−
What is a Monthly Active User in Pendo?
Monthly active users (MAUs) are the number of unique visitors who were active in your app over the last 30 calendar days. In general, a unique visitor is counted as an active user if they engage with your app(s) at least once within a specified time period.
+
−
Does the number of applications I have, or the number of sessions I have affect my pricing with Pendo?
No. Pendo pricing is based on Monthly Active Users (MAUs), not the number of applications you track or the number of sessions a user has. You can use Pendo across multiple applications at no additional cost per application. In fact, adding more applications gives you richer insights and a more complete view of your users.
+
−
Does Pendo offer discounts?
Volume and bundle discounts are already built into our pricing. We can also tailor additional options to your specific business needs. Your Pendo representative can guide you through the best fit.
+
−
Does Pendo offer a free trial?
Yes. We offer a 30-day free trial of the full Pendo platform. Because Pendo is an extensive solution, we recommend starting with the areas most relevant to your goals, then expanding from there.
If you’re already a customer and want to try additional functionality, reach out. We’re happy to set up trial access so you can explore new features when the timing is right for your team.
+
−
How is the Pendo free trial different from Pendo Free, and how do I choose?
Pendo Free is our free-forever version that helps teams get started with improving their software experience. It includes product analytics, in-app guides, Pendo-branded roadmaps, and Pendo-branded NPS surveys, and supports unlimited web and mobile app keys for up to 500 monthly active users (MAUs). It’s a great way to explore core functionality and see the power of Pendo in action.
The 30-day free trial gives you access to the entire platform – analytics, in-app guides, feedback, journey orchestration, and more – so you can experience everything before choosing the plan that fits your needs. If you want the full picture of what Pendo can do, the trial is the best place to start.
+
−
Can I customize a Pendo plan?
Our bundles are designed to deliver the most value by combining capabilities that work best together. That said, we know every business is different and plans can be customized based on your business needs. Talk to a rep for more information.
+
−
What integrations does Pendo support?
Pendo connects with more than 85 tools across CRM, support, marketing automation, collaboration, and analytics platforms. For the complete list, visit the
Pendo integrations page
.
+
−
What happens if I exceed my Pendo plan limits?
If you’re on a paid plan, exceeding your MAU limit won’t disrupt your Pendo experience. Your functionality will continue to run without interruption. Your Pendo account representative will reach out to understand whether the increase is due to expected growth that may require a contract adjustment, or if it’s a configuration issue we can help resolve.
If you’re on Pendo Free, exceeding the MAU limit means you won’t be able to create new guides, NPS surveys, or segments until you upgrade to a paid plan.
No pressure. Just answers.
See how Pendo works for your specific challenges, whether you’re tracking adoption, proving ROI, or measuring AI.

analysis.name: Pendo
analysis.tagline: Close the gap between AI spend and AI adoption.

differentiators: Largest product data set: 35 trillion events, 1B+ users, 50K+ agents/apps
All-in access — no gated features or forced upgrades within a purchased module
Retroactive analytics — full data history from day of install without pre-defining events
MCP server that pipes Pendo data into any LLM (Claude, Cursor, ChatGPT)
MAU-based pricing that ignores app count and session count
Unified platform spanning analytics, guides, replay, sentiment, orchestration, and prediction

recent_ships.what: Novus — free beta AI auto-instrumentation that connects to your repo and instruments the product in ~30 minutes
recent_ships.source: Shipping with AI coding Agents? Try Novus. Connect your repo and Novus auto-instruments your product in about 30 minutes.

recent_ships.what: Agent Analytics — measures AI agent adoption, usage, and connection to retention/revenue
recent_ships.source: Track AI, prove ROI. Measure how users interact with AI agents and connect those experiences to real outcomes

recent_ships.what: Pendo MCP — connects Pendo data to Claude, Cursor, and other LLMs
recent_ships.source: Connect Pendo data to Claude, Cursor, or any AI tool to unlock product context wherever you work.
Pendomonium 2026 Release · Start learning

praised: 'Pendo'ing it means empowerment to make positive changes for users without involving development
Faster/more nimble product iteration
In-product feedback captured at moment of AI agent interaction (Demandbase testimonial)
Effectively zero errors after implementation (customer quote)
complaints: Guide display/seen states scoped by Visitor ID rather than browser (community request)
Cross-origin iframe element tagging is difficult (community request)
Android obfuscation challenges with Pendo mobile SDK
No native .NET SDK for ASP.NET Core (community post)
Feature tagging by URL area is limited (community request)

free_tier.limits: Up to 500 MAUs; Pendo-branded; Product Analytics + In-app Guides + NPS only

tiers.name: Free
tiers.headline_inclusions: 500 MAUs, Product Analytics, In-app Guides, NPS (Pendo-branded)

tiers.name: Base
tiers.headline_inclusions: Custom MAU volume; Product Analytics + In-app Guides

tiers.name: Core
tiers.headline_inclusions: Adds Session Replay to Base for full user-journey visibility

tiers.name: Ultimate
tiers.headline_inclusions: Everything + Sentiment surveys, Orchestrate, Listen, Data Sync

tiers.name: Predict (add-on)
tiers.headline_inclusions: Churn/upsell prediction models with CRM & BI connectivity

tiers.name: Agent Analytics (add-on)
tiers.headline_inclusions: Free prompt allowance; adoption metrics + AI issue detection

pricing.notes: MAU-based pricing (unique visitors active in last 30 days); app count and session count don't affect price; volume discounts built in; 30-day free trial of full platform available separately from Free tier; Predict and Agent Analytics sold as add-ons attachable to any plan

Book a demo

Hotjar has evolved into something
more powerful
Hotjar is now part of Contentsquare.
Together, we’ve built a powerful, easy-to-use platform designed to help you to go from insight to impact, fast.
What does this mean for you?
Everything you know and love about Hotjar, plus so much more.
Book a demo
Get started free
No credit card required
Trusted and used by 1.3+ million websites and apps
All together. All connected.
Why settle for one tool, when you can have it all? Give your team the tools they need to deliver experiences that convert, every time.
Heatmaps
Find new ways to improve any page
See where users move, click, and scroll. Identify what’s working—and what’s not—on every page. Combine heatmaps with feedback to answer tough questions about visitor behavior.
Session Replay
See what your users see
Watch real user journeys to quickly spot bugs, confusion, and drop-offs.
Get a one-click summary that highlights key moments so you can quickly spot issues.
Connect replays with heatmaps and survey responses to get the full picture of what people experience.
Funnels
Visualize user drop-offs across key journeys
See where users drop off, why, and what to do next. Compare funnels across devices or segments, or just ask Sense to pinpoint blockers for you
Surveys
Collect and analyze user feedback
Create surveys in seconds and get responses in minutes with 40+ templates and the AI survey generator. Quickly understand results with AI summary reports and sentiment analysis, and invite respondents to follow-up interviews with a click.
User tests
Get unfiltered feedback on sites and prototypes
See how people interact with your website, product, or early designs—in their own time, no moderator required.
Everything you love about Hotjar. Now with more power.
Hotjar has joined forces with Contentsquare, alongside Heap, to build a more powerful experience intelligence platform. Soon, you’ll have more ways to understand your users, and improve every step of their journey.
Hotjar’s core capabilities aren’t going anywhere. Heatmaps, Recordings (known as Session Replay in Contentsquare), surveys, and feedback tools are still here—easy to use and fast to set up. Product Analytics from Heap is on the way and will roll out over time. Stay tuned!
The Hotjar you know and love, now even more powerful.
Hotjar is now officially part of Contentsquare—alongside Heap. Together, we’re bringing you deeper insights, smarter decision-making, and faster ways to improve your user experience.

Cookie Policy
Allow All
Strictly Necessary Cookies
Always Active
These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms.    You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the site will not then work. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable information.
Cookies Details‎
Functional Cookies
Functional Cookies
These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalisation. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages.    If you do not allow these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.
Cookies Details‎
Performance Cookies
Performance Cookies
These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site.    All information these cookies collect is aggregated and therefore anonymous. If you do not allow these cookies we will not know when you have visited our site, and will not be able to monitor its performance.
Cookies Details‎
Targeting Cookies
Targeting Cookies
These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites.    They do not store directly personal information, but are based on uniquely identifying your browser and internet device. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising.

Cookies help us understand how visitors use our website so we can provide an enhanced browsing experience. For more information on the cookies we use, see our
Cookie Policy
Allow All
Strictly Necessary Cookies
Always Active
These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms.    You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the site will not then work. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable information.
Cookies Details
Functional Cookies
Functional Cookies
These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalisation. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages.    If you do not allow these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.
Cookies Details
Performance Cookies
Performance Cookies
These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site.    All information these cookies collect is aggregated and therefore anonymous. If you do not allow these cookies we will not know when you have visited our site, and will not be able to monitor its performance.
Cookies Details
Targeting Cookies
Targeting Cookies
These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites.    They do not store directly personal information, but are based on uniquely identifying your browser and internet device. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising.

Contentsquare Partner Program
Better experiences. Shared growth. Welcome, partner.
Pick your path
Pick your path
Join Contentsquare’s Partner Program: a global network of agencies, platforms, and product innovators transforming digital experience with AI-powered insights. Get the training, tools, and support you need to unlock measurable results—for your business and your clients.
Pick your path
Pick your path
Benefits
Why partner with us
Ways to partner
FAQs
Pick your partnership path
Solution Partner
Build a catalog of value-added services to help clients drive better experiences, measurable results, and mutual growth.
Learn more
Technology Partner
Integrate your product with Contentsquare to deliver deeper insights, a better digital experience, and shared growth.
Learn more
Cloud, Data, & Platform Partner
Blend Contentsquare intelligence with your cloud, marketplace, or data platform to power smarter analyses and measurable results.
Learn more
Reseller Partner
Offer best-in-class digital experience intelligence to your customers by selling Contentsquare directly and acting as the fulfillment agent for the deal.
Learn more
Learn
Chevron
Build specialized expertise that sets you apart
Become the experience intelligence expert your customers count on. With access to Partner University, role-based certifications, and hands-on support from our teams, you’ll gain the knowledge and confidence to deliver more impact, faster.
Grow
Chevron
Unlock new revenue and growth opportunities
Grow your business through differentiated offerings and partner-led referrals, leads, and commissions. Tap into new revenue streams, build customer trust, and boost visibility through our partner directory and ecosystem.
Innovate
Chevron
Co-innovate and shape what’s next, together
Our tiered program recognizes your contributions and invests in your success. Get early access to beta features, product roadmaps, and collaboration opportunities. Whether you’re selling, integrating, or extending Contentsquare, we partner with you to deliver more value—together.
Why partners choose Contentsquare
Your clients expect more—on tighter budgets, with pressure to prove the impact of every digital initiative. As a Contentsquare Partner, we help you exceed those expectations and deliver measurable results with confidence.
Grow with a trusted leader
Trusted by 3,700+ enterprise brands across 1.3M+ websites and apps to capture entire user journeys with AI-powered insights.
Get certified & supported
Become the intelligence experience expert your customers count on, with Partner University training and certifications.
Unlock new growth
Deliver measurable impact for your clients and new business for your team with referral incentives and go-to-market support.
There are multiple benefits to partnering with Contentsquare. Our customers benefit because they get greater visibility from both technologies on how they can make changes that are more meaningful and substantial—they're buying into a solution that helps solve their problems.
Alastair Forbes
EMEA Head of Ecosystem & Alliances at Bazaarvoice
Four ways to partner
Still not sure where you fit? No two partners are the same, so we offer flexible partnership models designed to meet you where you are. Let’s find the right path for you.
Solution Partners
Help your clients grow by delivering better digital experiences, backed by data. We’ll support you with exclusive Partner University training, go-to-market tools, and co-selling opportunities to drive measurable impact and unlock new revenue.
Learn more
Technology Partners
Integrate with Contentsquare to enhance the value of your product. Access APIs, technical enablement, and go-to-market opportunities, so you can integrate faster, minimize costs, and maximize adoption and retention.
Learn more
Cloud, Data, & Platform Partner
Bring Contentsquare’s AI-powered insights into your cloud, data, or marketplace ecosystem to fuel smarter decisions and shared business outcomes. Get the technical enablement and go-to-market support you need to scale adoption and help customers get more from their data.
Learn more
Reseller Partners
Add Contentsquare to your portfolio and earn by selling industry-leading analytics. Offer Contentsquare solutions directly to your customers with sales enablement, onboarding support, and a rewards structure that scales as you grow.
Learn more
Contentsquare Partner Program FAQs
Got another question?
What types of partnerships does Contentsquare offer?
Chevron
We have four main partner programs: Solution, Technology, Cloud & Data, and Reseller. Each is designed to meet different needs—whether you deliver client services, build integrations, enrich cloud data, or resell our platform.
How do I know which program is right for me?
Chevron
It depends on how you work with customers.
If you’re an agency or consultancy driving digital transformation →
Solution Partner
If you’re a software provider looking to integrate with Contentsquare →
Technology Partner
If cloud infrastructure, marketplaces, or data warehouses are your thing →
Cloud, Data, & Platform Partner
If you want to sell Contentsquare directly →
Reseller Partner
How do I join a program?
Chevron
Each program page includes specific instructions on how to apply (through a form or by email). Once you submit your details, our partner team will review your application and get in touch with next steps. Start by choosing the partnership path that best fits your business.
Is there a cost to becoming a partner?
Chevron
No. Joining our partner programs is free. We invest in our partners’ success and provide resources, training, and support at no cost.
What benefits and support do partners receive?
Chevron
We provide onboarding, training, and ongoing support—plus a dedicated partner portal with resources, sales tools, and co-marketing materials. For technology integrations, our team offers technical guidance to help ensure a smooth connection. Benefits vary by program tier, but may include:
Training and certifications via Partner University
Access to exclusive partner enablement materials
Co-marketing opportunities
Revenue share or referral commissions
Technical integration support and APIs
Dedicated partner management
Do I need to be a Contentsquare customer to join?
Chevron
No. While some partners are also Contentsquare customers, it’s not a requirement. You just need to work with clients or users who could benefit from digital experience analytics.
Can I join more than one program?
Chevron
Some organizations have overlapping models (e.g. offer services and build integrations) and may participate in more than one program. However, you cannot refer customers under both programs. If you want to refer customers to us, you need to pick the program—Solution or Technology—that best fits your business.

Your Privacy
When you visit any website, it may store or retrieve information on your browser, mostly in the form of cookies. This information might be about you, your preferences, or your device, and is mostly used to make the site work as you expect. The information does not usually identify you directly, but it can give you a more personalized web experience. Because we respect your right to privacy, you can choose not to allow some types of cookies. Click on the different category headings to learn more and change our default settings. Blocking some types of cookies may impact your experience of the site and the services we are able to offer.
More information
Functional Cookies
Always Active
These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalisation. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages.    If you do not allow these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.
Targeting Cookies
Targeting Cookies
These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites.    They do not store directly personal information, but are based on uniquely identifying your browser and internet device. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising.
Performance Cookies
Performance Cookies
These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site.    All information these cookies collect is aggregated and therefore anonymous. If you do not allow these cookies we will not know when you have visited our site, and will not be able to monitor its performance.
Strictly Necessary Cookies
Always Active
These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms.    You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the site will not then work. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable information.

analysis.name: Hotjar
analysis.tagline: Hotjar has evolved into something more powerful
analysis.value_proposition: All-in-one behavior analytics platform combining heatmaps, session replay, funnels, surveys, and user testing to help teams understand and improve digital experiences.
analysis.ideal_customer: Product managers, UX designers, and growth teams at small-to-mid-size web businesses who want qualitative and quantitative user insight without enterprise tooling complexity

features.name: heatmaps
features.description: Visualize where users click, move, and scroll on any page
features.evidence_quote: See where users move, click, and scroll. Identify what's working—and what's not—on every page.

features.name: zone-based heatmaps
features.description: Element-level heatmap view showing which page zones attract attention and drive conversions
features.evidence_quote: See which page elements attract attention and drive conversions. Discover what's working and what needs optimization.

features.name: session replay
features.description: Watch recorded real-user sessions to spot bugs, confusion, and drop-offs
features.evidence_quote: Watch real user journeys to quickly spot bugs, confusion, and drop-offs.

features.name: session replay ai summary
features.description: One-click AI-generated summary of key moments within a session replay
features.evidence_quote: Get a one-click summary that highlights key moments so you can quickly spot issues.

features.name: funnels
features.description: Visualize step-by-step user drop-offs across key conversion journeys
features.evidence_quote: See where users drop off, why, and what to do next. Compare funnels across devices or segments.

features.name: surveys
features.description: On-site and in-app survey tool with 40+ templates and AI-powered generation
features.evidence_quote: Create surveys in seconds and get responses in minutes with 40+ templates and the AI survey generator.

features.name: ai survey generator
features.description: Generate survey questions automatically using AI
features.evidence_quote: Create surveys in seconds and get responses in minutes with 40+ templates and the AI survey generator.

features.name: ai survey summary reports
features.description: AI-generated summaries that distill survey response patterns
features.evidence_quote: Quickly understand results with AI summary reports and sentiment analysis

features.name: sentiment analysis
features.description: Automated sentiment scoring of open-ended survey responses
features.evidence_quote: Quickly understand results with AI summary reports and sentiment analysis

features.name: user interviews (engage)
features.description: Recruit participants and schedule moderated or async research sessions directly from survey respondents
features.evidence_quote: invite respondents to follow-up interviews with a click

features.name: user tests
features.description: Async, unmoderated usability testing on live sites or prototypes
features.evidence_quote: See how people interact with your website, product, or early designs—in their own time, no moderator required.

features.name: feedback widgets
features.description: Persistent on-page feedback buttons for continuous visitor input (Incoming Feedback)

features.name: trends
features.description: Time-series analytics view to track changes in user behavior metrics over time
features.evidence_quote: How to Use Trends — An overview of Trends

features.name: highlights
features.description: Save and share notable moments from session recordings with teammates

features.name: dashboard
features.description: Unified overview combining key metrics, heatmap snapshots, and funnel status

features.name: journey analysis
features.description: Sankey/flow visualization of how visitors progress through site pages from entry to exit
features.evidence_quote: Discover how visitors progress through your site and app, from entry to exit.

features.name: impact quantification
features.description: Quantifies the conversion impact of any behavior, issue, or segment to prioritize fixes
features.evidence_quote: Prioritize what to fix or invest in by quantifying the impact of any behavior, issue, or segment on conversion.

features.name: error & performance monitoring
features.description: Detects and tracks JavaScript errors across pages, surfaced in dashboards and session replays
features.evidence_quote: Monitor and find JavaScript errors across your pages. Track them on dashboards, replays, or even filter your data by these errors.

features.name: sense ai assistant
features.description: Conversational AI that surfaces guided insights, next steps, and session replay summaries
features.evidence_quote: Sense, your personal AI assistant, to get guided insights and next steps — or surface key behaviors in seconds.

features.name: mcp (llm integration)
features.description: Connect Contentsquare/Hotjar data to AI tools like ChatGPT, Claude, and Copilot via MCP
features.evidence_quote: Query Contentsquare in natural language — directly from ChatGPT, Claude, Copilot, and more.

features.name: llm intelligence
features.description: Analytics for traffic originating from ChatGPT apps and LLM-driven referrals
features.evidence_quote: Learn more about our analytics for ChatGPT apps and LLM traffic

features.name: events api
features.description: API to track custom user actions and pipe them into Hotjar data
features.evidence_quote: Events API to track custom user actions

features.name: identify api
features.description: API to attach custom user attributes (e.g. plan, user ID) to sessions
features.evidence_quote: Identify API for tracking custom user attributes

features.name: google tag manager support
features.description: Install and configure Hotjar tracking via GTM without code changes
features.evidence_quote: Using Google Tag Manager with Hotjar

features.name: mobile app tracking
features.description: Capture session data and behavior analytics from native mobile apps

features.name: team collaboration
features.description: Multi-seat access with team member roles and project-level workspaces
features.evidence_quote: Collaborating with Your Team — A checklist of our top tips for team collaboration with Hotjar

features.name: data export / sharing
features.description: Export and share recordings, heatmaps, and survey data with stakeholders
features.evidence_quote: How to Share and Export Data

features.name: gdpr & ccpa compliance
features.description: Built-in consent management, data suppression, and privacy controls for EU/US regulations

features.name: cross-device funnel comparison
features.description: Compare funnel drop-off rates segmented by device type
features.evidence_quote: Compare funnels across devices or segments

features.name: connected insights (replay + heatmap + survey)
features.description: Link session replays, heatmaps, and survey responses for a unified view of the same user
features.evidence_quote: Connect replays with heatmaps and survey responses to get the full picture of what people experience.

features.name: data connect
features.description: Export raw behavioral data to external data warehouses or BI tools

features.name: web analytics
features.description: Basic web traffic and visitor analytics alongside behavioral data

features.name: survey templates
features.description: Library of 40+ pre-built survey templates for common research scenarios
features.evidence_quote: 40+ templates and the AI survey generator

features.name: user attribute tracking (add events + attributes)
features.description: Tag sessions with custom user attributes and events for segmentation and filtering
features.evidence_quote: Add the Hotjar Tracking Code, Events, and User Attributes

differentiators: Trusted by 1.3+ million websites and apps in 180+ countries
Now part of Contentsquare platform, combining Hotjar + Heap for experience + product analytics
GDPR- & CCPA-ready out of the box
One-click session replay AI summaries to surface key moments instantly
Connect replays, heatmaps, and survey responses in a single unified view
MCP integration allows querying behavioral data in natural language via ChatGPT/Claude/Copilot
LLM intelligence analytics for ChatGPT app traffic — a new category

recent_ships.what: Hotjar merged into Contentsquare platform alongside Heap; unified pricing and product surface
recent_ships.source: Hotjar is now part of Contentsquare. Together, we've built a powerful, easy-to-use platform.

recent_ships.what: Sense AI assistant launched — guided insights, next steps, and replay summaries
recent_ships.source: Sense, your personal AI assistant, to get guided insights and next steps — or surface key behaviors in seconds.

recent_ships.what: MCP integration — connect Contentsquare insights to ChatGPT, Claude, Copilot via natural language
recent_ships.source: Query Contentsquare in natural language — directly from ChatGPT, Claude, Copilot, and more.

recent_ships.what: LLM intelligence analytics for ChatGPT apps and LLM-driven traffic launched
recent_ships.source: Contentsquare launches new AI agent and analytics capabilities across ChatGPT apps, LLM traffic, and conversation intelligence

praised: Widely used as the reference-point tool for heatmaps and session recording (spawning multiple 'self-hosted alternatives' on HN)
Easy to use and fast to set up — core value proposition repeated across all surfaces
complaints: Rejection/friction in sign-up led at least one developer to build their own alternative ('Got rejected by Hotjar, decided to build my own')
Multiple HN threads building open-source/self-hosted alternatives suggest pricing or privacy concerns with the hosted product

free_tier.limits: 200k monthly sessions, 1 project, 100 surveys/month, basic features only

tiers.name: Free
tiers.headline_inclusions: 200k sessions/mo, 1 project, replays, heatmaps, funnels, error monitoring, basic surveys, MCP

tiers.name: Growth
tiers.headline_inclusions: From 7k sessions/mo, 3 projects, 13mo data, zone heatmaps, journey analysis, impact quantification, Sense AI

pricing.notes: Pricing page now resolves to Contentsquare (post-acquisition). Free plan advertises 200k sessions/month; Growth plan starts 'from 7k monthly sessions' — likely session replays specifically vs. total tracked sessions on free. $49/mo billed monthly, $39/mo billed annually. Additional tiers (Business, Enterprise) implied by Contentsquare platform but not fully enumerated in scraped source. Session count likely scales via add-ons above the base Growth tier.

FAQ
What does Matomo Cloud include in its price?
Matomo's Cloud plans include hosting, maintenance, automatic updates, security monitoring, daily backups, and access to all Matomo features.
Is there a free trial for Matomo Cloud?
Yes, a free trial is available with access to all core features. You don’t need a credit card for the free trial.
Are updates included with Matomo Cloud?
Yes! Our Cloud plans come with automatic updates.
How do costs change as my traffic grows?
Cloud pricing increases with traffic tiers.
Are the new bundles only for On-Premise, or do they also affect Cloud?
The new plugin bundles apply to Matomo On-Premise. Matomo Cloud plans already include access to Matomo features as part of the hosted subscription and are not affected by the On-Premise plugin bundle structure.
Can I upgrade or downgrade my Matomo Cloud plan at any time?
Yes! When you do, you’ll only pay for the difference based on the number of days left in your current billing period (prorating). You can also switch between yearly and monthly billing.
Do you have special plans for open-source projects, non-profits, groups of friends, and other non-commercial entities?
We are proud to support non-profit organisations and charities around the world that seek to better their communities, provide social good, preserve culture or the environment, provide relief to the poor, or promote human rights. Eligible non-profit organisations may receive a discount.
Get in touch to learn more.
Can I move between Cloud-hosted and On-Premise at any time?
Yes! That’s because you are the owner of your data. We can import the data that you’ve collected On-Premise (when you self-host Matomo) and import it into the Cloud (SaaS) or give you an export from your data on the Cloud so you can use it On-Premise.
Email us to get more information.
Where is the data located?
When you choose to use our Cloud-hosted version, the data is stored in Frankfurt, Germany. When you
self-host Matomo On-Premise
you can choose where the data should be located by setting up servers in your preferred location.
How can I purchase a Matomo Cloud plan?
To purchase a Matomo Cloud plan you first need to create an account by signing up for a
free Cloud trial
. Once you have created an account, you can follow the
next steps here
.

FAQ
Do you have special plans for open-source projects, non-profits, groups of friends, and other non-commercial entities?
We are proud to support non-profit organisations and charities around the world that seek to better their communities, provide social good, preserve culture or the environment, provide relief to the poor, or promote human rights. Eligible non-profit organisations may receive a discount.
Get in touch to learn more.
I’m a Matomo customer and the pricing and bundle options on the website differ from the ones in my Matomo account?
The pricing and bundle options shown on the website may differ from the options currently associated with your account. The updated bundles are not a direct one-to-one replacement for previous plugin bundles. Existing customers can continue to purchase and renew products under their current pricing structure. To find these, log into your marketplace account.
Are updates included in the price?
When you subscribe to a plugin bundle for Matomo On-Premise, all updates released during the subscription period are included.
Can I upgrade or downgrade to a different bundle later if my needs change?
Yes. You can upgrade to a higher bundle as your needs grow. you can downgrade at renewal if the lower bundle still includes the features and limits you need. If you rely on features only available in a higher bundle, those features may no longer be available after downgrading.
Can I still buy plugins separately?
Yes. Premium plugins can still be purchased separately for Matomo On-Premise. Plugin bundles are also available if you want access to a wider set of features at a bundled price.
Can I trial a specific bundle before purchasing?
Yes. The Team bundle includes a free trial, allowing you to evaluate its features before committing. For our other bundles, free trials are not available, but you can still evaluate many premium On-Premise features by requesting a trial or using trial versions where available. Contact us to discuss the best option for your environment and requirements.
Can I mix and match plugins from different bundles?
Plugin bundles are predefined packages, but you can supplement your setup by purchasing additional individual plugins separately.
Can I cancel at any time?
Yes, subscriptions can be cancelled anytime. They remain active until the end of the billing period.
Can we purchase additional seats/users for our current bundle without moving to the next bundle tier?
Seat and usage limits depend on the specific On-Premise bundle. In some cases, additional capacity may be available without requiring a full bundle upgrade. Contact us to discuss the available options for your licence.
What happens to my current subscription if I choose not to move to a bundle?
Your existing individual plugin subscriptions can continue to be renewed separately. Moving to a bundle is optional.

Analytics Platform - Matomo
Integrations
Matomo currently can easily integrate with 100+ technologies including Content Managing Systems, Online Shops, Forums, Frameworks and more.
Have you developed an integration you’d like to share with us?
Find out how
Content Management Systems
By
Matomo
For
WordPress
Matomo Analytics for WordPress
The Matomo Analytics for WordPress plugin is a privacy-friendly web analytics solution that integrates Matomo directly into WordPress.
Read more
Download
By
it-conserv.de
For
Joomla 4
Matomo for Joomla 4
In German and English. If migrating from the Joomla 3 version of this, best procedure at this time:
a) deactivate the old plugin (for Joomla 3)
b) install the new one (for Joomla 4)
c) copy the data (JavaScript) from the old plugin to the new one
d) activate the new plugin
c) uninstall the old plugin
Read more
Download
By
it-conserv.de
For
Joomla 3
itcs Matomo for Joomla 3
This Plugin includes the Matomo tracking code and the opt-out iframe code in your website. Language packs for German and English.
Read more
Download
By
Chris Müller
For
TYPO3 – Matomo Widgets
TYPO3-Matomo Widgets
The extension integrates charts for various Matomo reports natively into the TYPO3 dashboard.
Read more
Download
By
various
For
Contao (TYPOLight)
Contao Extension
The Contao community lists several options for integrating Contao and Matomo.
Read more
Download
By
Olivier Meunier
For
dotclear
Dotclear2 Plugin Matomo
This plugin integrates the Matomo statistical tool in Dotclear.
Read more
Download
By
Thiago Arrais
For
Grafana
Grafana – Matomo Tracking Panel
This panel allows Grafana dashboard usage to be tracked using Matomo. It does only tracking and has no visible presence. Watch the
MatomoCamp tutorial
.
Read more
Download
By
Isaac S.nchez Barrera
For
MediaWiki
Mediawiki Extension Matomo
This extension inserts the Matomo tracking code to the bottom of every page. It excludes the views of the users with ‘bot’ privileges (bots) and the ‘protect’ privileges (sysops). It also adds a Special Page with selected reports.
Read more
Download
By
SPIP Community
For
SPIP
SPIP and Matomo
This plugin add the Piwik tracking code to your SPIP using #INSERT_HEAD.
Provide also a #PIWIK tag to allow a custom theme integration.
Read more
Download
By
Hyvor Blogs
For
Hyvor Blogs
Start tracking your Hyvor Blog’s progress with Matomo Analytics
This integration enables users of Hyvor Blogs – a privacy-focused, developer-friendly blogging platform – to seamlessly add Matomo Analytics to their blogs. Users simply paste their standard Matomo tracking code directly into the Hyvor Blogs console, and it will be automatically injected into all blog pages.
Read more
Download
By
Thomas Czernik
For
MTM Inspector
Matomo for MTM Inspector
MTM Inspector is a free web-based tool that detects and analyzes the Matomo Tag Manager container on any website. Users enter a website URL or a direct container JS URL, and the tool extracts and lists the container’s tags, triggers and variables, including from production containers with hashed names.
Read more
Download
By
Matomo
For
Analytics Dashboard for WordPress
Connect Matomo WordPress Plugin
This plugin adds a new Stats dashboard to your WordPress admin area. It’s also able to add and customize the Matomo tracking code to your blog using wp_footer, and provides support for Multi Sites Networks.
Read more
Download
By
Squarespace
For
Squarespace
Matomo for Squarespace
If you want to integrate Matomo Analytics with your Squarespace website to get valuable insights, you’re in the right spot. Read the
Squarespace and Matomo Integration Guide
to complete your setup.
Read more
Download
By
General Outline, Inc
For
Outline
Outline
Matomo for Outline
Connect Matomo to an Outline instance to measure activity and analytics for your knowledge base.

Project on GitHub:
https://github.com/outline/outline
Read more
Download
By
Ghost
For
Ghost
Ghost
Take control of your site’s analytics with a Matomo and Ghost integration for powerful web analytics.
Read more
Download
By
Lutece Team
For
Lutece Project
Lutece Plugin
This plugin lets you add a Matomo tracker script into your site pages.

It also provides an embeded Matomo dashboard in the Back Office.
Read more
Download
By
Alexander Hass and Joseph Flatt
For
Backdrop
Backdrop
Integrate Matomo with Backdrop CMS using the Matomo Analytics module, developed and maintained by the Backdrop CMS community. Read the
Matomo and Backdrop CMS Integration Guide
.
Read more
Download
By
David Bezemer
For
Moodle
Moodle Analytics
Moodle Analytics is a plugin that lets you integrate the Piwik tracking in your Moodle learning platform.
Read more
Download
By
Pimcore
For
Pimcore
Pimcore native integration of Matomo Analytics
Pimcore features a built-in integration of Matomo. It can can display Matomo dashboards and widgets. Pimcore eCommerce uses the Matomo API to retrieve information about specific users or pages automatically and connect it to your product data.
Read more
Download
By
Thirtybees
For
Thirtybees
Thirtybees
It is an open source connector to connect the thirty bees ecommerce platform to Matomo, to allow for tracking of actions and users in Matomo.
Read more
Download
By
Mathias Brodala (Pagemachine AG)
For
TYPO3
TYPO3 Matomo Tracking
Server-side Matomo Tracking in
TYPO3
with emphasis on privacy: consentless tracking, GDPR/TDDDG-compliant, respects DNT/GPC
Read more
Download
By
Alexander Hass
For
Drupal
Matomo for Drupal
This module automatically adds the Matomo tracking code to your Drupal website. It can also selectively track certain users, roles and pages and provide direct access to statistics in the reports section using Matomo widgets and API. Read the
Drupal and Matomo Integration Guide
.
Read more
Download
By
Alexander Müller
For
Joomla 4 and 5
Joomla 4 & 5 Analytics
Native Plugin for Joomla 4 AND Joomla 5. 
Connects automatically Google Analytics or Matomo to your Website. 
Uses the Joomla Update System. 
Free. 
No legacy Plugin is needed.
Read more
Download
By
Chris Müller
For
TYPO3
TYPO3-Matomo Integration
The extension integrates the Matomo Analytics tracking code easily into TYPO3.
Read more
Download
By
Sylvain Julé
For
Kirby CMS
Kirby Matomo
This plugin helps you generate a tracking code for Matomo, and displays some useful metrics directly within the panel. 
Kirby 3 only.
Read more
Download
By
Flowpack
For
Neos
Neos Matomo Package
This package integrates Matomo into Neos and is also compatible with older Piwik installations. It also provides an Opt-Out content element and statistics in the Property Inspector.
Read more
Download
By
Openmost
For
WordPress
Matomo Site Kit
Matomo Site Kit is a
WordPress plugin
that makes it easy to install and configure Matomo (Cloud or On-Premise) on a WordPress site in seconds, offering built-in dashboards, enhanced dataLayer support, and GDPR-compliant tracking configuration.
Read more
Download
By
Odd Camp
For
DatoCMS (headless)
Dato
Provides a link to your Matomo account for the current record in the DatoCMS sidebar.
Read more
Download
By
SiteJet
For
SiteJet
SiteJet
SiteJet is a low code / no code web builder. 
Matomo comes standard, built-in to the SiteJet CMS experience.
Read more
Download
By
LineUpr
For
LineUpr
LineUpr
LineUpr is the platform to digitally communicate your event or hybrid event and engage participants interactively with surveys, polls and networking features wherever they are. LineUpr features a built-in integration of Matomo, once Matomo instance URL and the sited id is added to LineUpr settings all the stats will be collected in Matomo.
Read more
Download
By
Mauricio Altamirano (Pagemachine AG)
For
Matomo
Pagemetrics for Matomo
Provides privacy friendly, server-side analytics for WordPress using the pagemachine/matomo-tracking PHP library. It sends page views and optional download events directly to your Matomo instance without loading the Matomo JavaScript tracker.
Read more
Download
Ecommerce – Online Shops
By
Matomo & InnoCraft
For
WooCommerce (WordPress)
WooCommerce Analytics
The Matomo plugin allows you to seamlessly integrate your WooCommerce online shop with Matomo and accurately track all Ecommerce interactions. Works even when visitors block the JavaScript or use adblockers. 100% accuracy. Get ecommerce analytics reports – orders, purchased items, abandoned carts and more.
Read more
Download
By
Henrik Hedelund
For
Adobe Commerce (previously Magento 2)
Magento 2 Extension
A module that integrates Matomo eCommerce tracking with your Adobe Commerce (previously Magento 2) store front: measure which product and category pages are viewed, items added & abandoned in the cart, and your orders and products.
Read more
Download
By
Community Developer
For
PrestaShop (English)
Matomo for PrestaShop (English language)
Add Matomo an analytics e-commerce tracking code on PrestaShop, as well as the code for a Tag Manager container. View the Matomo dashboard from PrestaShop.
Read more
Download
By
designhaus 42
For
PrestaShop
PrestaShop extension for Matomo
This module integrates the Matomo Tracking code in the Prestashop and automatically tracks Ecommerce activity: product and category page views, cart updates, ecommerce orders and all the standard Matomo reports.
Read more
Download
By
Tony McCreath
For
Tag Rocket for BigCommerce
Tag Rocket for the BigCommerce CMS
The app has some built-in integrations, plus the ability to add custom integrations via its API. This includes integration for Matomo. Read the
Tag Rocket and Matomo integration guide
.
Read more
Download
By
ANIMAL
For
Thelia
Thelia
User and e-commerce tracking into Thelia. E-commerce Analytics with Symfony and Piwik: Orders & Items Purchased, Add to Cart & Items Added to the Cart, Tracking Product Page Views & Category Page Views.
Read more
Download
By
Shopify
For
Shopify
Shopify Custom Pixels
Shopify is a versatile Ecommerce platform for businesses of all sizes. Shopify merchants can install the Matomo tracking code using the recommended custom pixel in Shopify’s Customer Events. Read the
Shopify and Matomo Integration Guide
.
Read more
Download
By
Campit
For
shopware
Shopware Integration
Smoothly integrates Matomo into your Shopware 6 system.
Read more
Download
By
Community Developer
For
PrestaShop
Matomo Tracker and Analytics (for en, de, es, fr, it)
Add Matomo Javascript to your store
Track abandoned carts
Track product views
Back office integration
Read more

analysis.name: Matomo
analysis.value_proposition: GDPR-compliant, unsampled web analytics with 100% data ownership, available as cloud or self-hosted open-source.
analysis.ideal_customer: Privacy-conscious organisations (enterprise, public sector, healthcare, finance, EU-regulated) that need accurate, GDPR-compliant analytics with full data ownership and want a Google Analytics alternative.

features.description: Full-fidelity analytics with no data sampling.
features.evidence_quote: No sampling and fewer blind spots from consent banners or blockers.

differentiators: 100% data ownership (cloud or self-hosted)
No data sampling — full-fidelity data
GDPR-compliant by design; cookieless/consent-free tracking option
Open-source alternative to Google Analytics
EU-based data residency (Frankfurt) by default on cloud
All features included at every tier (no premium feature paywalls)
ISO 27001:2022 certified
Native import of Google Analytics history
AI-traffic tracking (visibility into AI assistants and agents)

praised: "user-friendly and provides all the features we need to understand our visitors" — Mark Farragher, MDFT Academy
"a serious contender to Google Analytics" — unsampled data and full data ownership vs GA
Massive cost savings vs. commercial competitors — MetaLocator: "We save about 150K per year using Matomo"
Aligns with privacy-first missions; customer data is never sold (Yorba testimonial)
Popular as an open-source, self-hostable alternative — 183-upvote HN thread
complaints: Sites using Matomo have reportedly been rejected/disallowed from Google Ads (364-upvote HN thread, plus a separate AdWords-rejection thread)
Some users migrating away to lighter tools ("Migrating my web analytics from Matomo to Umami")
Perceived complexity/heaviness vs newer minimalist analytics tools (implied by Umami/Plausible/Fathom comparison pages)

free_tier.limits: 21-day free cloud trial with full feature access; self-hosted On-Premise is free forever

tiers.name: Cloud Business (Recommended)
tiers.headline_inclusions: 50k hits/mo, 30 sites, 30 users, 100 segments, 150 goals, all features, EU hosting

tiers.name: Cloud Enterprise
tiers.headline_inclusions: Custom allowances, CSM, tailored pricing for >10M hits/mo

tiers.name: On-Premise (self-hosted)
tiers.headline_inclusions: Free open-source core; premium plugin bundles sold separately via Marketplace

pricing.notes: Cloud pricing is hit-based (traffic tiers), not seat-based; overage priced at $2.60 per additional 5,000 hits/mo. Cloud data hosted in Frankfurt, Germany. Data Warehouse Connector is an add-on starting at $5/mo. Non-profit discounts available. On-Premise uses a plugin-bundle model; Cloud includes all features by default. Can migrate between Cloud and On-Premise freely (own your data).
